authorizedStatement: I authorize AP04 first-live execution gate for RB-G9-20260713-AP04: perform fresh readiness/timing/flat-state checks, process isolation, C1-C3 arming transition, create a schema-valid micro_live_execution runtime stub, refresh candidate quote, and execute exactly one 0.005 SOL BUY of mint JUPyiwrYJFskUPiHa7hkeR8VUtAeFoSYbKedZNsDvCN via pair/pool 3xNGdc58axYtrJ64STQz5TrdQWVtWHLR888iRBbWZnEe with mandatory SELL exit under signed bounds; no executor/scanner loop, no second entry, no scaling, keep SOLANA_SIGNER_SECRET redacted, leave FOMO Wallet Monitor untouched, and stop/fail closed if any readiness, timing, posture, quote, candidate, stub, signer, RPC, submission, confirmation, reconciliation, or flat-state check fails. CONFIRM RB-G9-20260713-AP04 FOR JUPyiwrYJFskUPiHa7hkeR8VUtAeFoSYbKedZNsDvCN AT 3xNGdc58axYtrJ64STQz5TrdQWVtWHLR888iRBbWZnEe - ONE 0.005 SOL ENTRY AND MANDATORY EXIT

blocker.reason: The supported live_executor entry path can submit a BUY, but executeLiveExit does not pass sellAmountTokenUnits into submitSwap. The SELL quote path derives quoteAmount from Number(sellAmountTokenUnits), so a mandatory immediate SELL cannot be guaranteed through the supported exported exit flow.
evidence: live_executor.js executeQuotedSwapAttempt uses quoteAmount = kind === "BUY" ? positionSizeSol lamports : Number(sellAmountTokenUnits)
live_executor.js executeLiveExitImpl calls submitSwap("SELL", ...) without sellAmountTokenUnits
legacy R43E real proof target is 0.01 SOL -> USDC and stopAfterFirstTransaction only, not the authorized 0.005 SOL -> JUP with mandatory exit

nextRequiredStep: Engineering remediation or an explicitly authorized, reviewed single-cycle entry-and-exit tool that binds actual BUY fill amount into the mandatory SELL path before any live entry is attempted.
